instruction: Can you get the Austin release review settled? Look over what's already on the board and calendar, move to anthropic/claude-3-7-sonnet-latest, refresh the handoff file, and fill only the missing review slot or decision-log task.
canonical_instruction: I need the Austin release review cleaned up. Please check what's already on the board and calendar, move to anthropic/claude-3-7-sonnet-latest, refresh the handoff file, and add only the missing review slot or decision-log task.
